w:r.w:t: AI-Powered Calorie, Weight & Nutrition Tracking Platform

NutriAI is an AI-driven web platform designed to help individuals take full control of their health by tracking calories, monitoring body weight, managing hydration, and receiving personalized nutrition guidance. Powered by advanced AI, NutriAI delivers instant meal analysis, personalized meal plans, low-calorie cooking instructions, recipe breakdowns, and weekly progress reports — all stored in a secure user account.

The platform bridges the gap between generic nutrition apps and personalized health coaching, making professional-grade dietary guidance accessible to everyone through a conversational, intelligent interface.
Enable users to log meals, track daily calorie and macro intake, and understand the nutritional value of what they eat.
Provide AI-generated personalized meal plans aligned with users' target weight and health goals.
Allow users to monitor body weight over time with AI-powered insights on how eating habits affect weight.
Offer a water intake tracker with AI-driven hydration recommendations based on user activity and goals.
Enable users to analyze any recipe for full calorie and macro breakdowns per ingredient and per serving.
Deliver automated weekly AI progress reports summarizing performance and providing actionable next steps.
Store all user logs, plans, and analyses in a secure personal account for historical reference.
Provide administrators with tools to manage users and monitor platform health.

Obesity, poor dietary habits, and lack of nutritional awareness are among the leading contributors to preventable health issues globally. While many calorie-tracking apps exist, most require manual data entry, lack personalization, and offer no intelligent feedback loop.

NutriAI addresses this gap by combining a user-friendly tracking interface with AI that understands natural language — users simply describe what they ate, and the AI handles the rest. This removes friction from the logging process and makes personalized health guidance available without the cost of a nutritionist.
The platform is designed for any individual looking to lose weight, maintain a healthy lifestyle, or gain a better understanding of their nutritional habits.
Track calories, weight, water; receive AI meal plans and coaching.
Manage user accounts, monitor platform health, and view analytics.
Build, maintain, and enhance the platform and AI integrations.
Ensure AI recommendations are nutritionally sound and safe.
The platform shall provide user registration, authentication, and secure account management.
The platform shall allow users to log daily meals and automatically calculate calorie and macro intake.
The platform shall allow users to log and monitor daily body weight with trend visualization.
The AI shall generate personalized meal plans based on user goal weight, timeline, and dietary preferences, including calorie counts per meal.
The AI shall provide instant feedback on how a consumed meal affects the user's weight and calorie targets.
The AI shall provide low-calorie cooking instructions for any requested meal.
The platform shall allow users to log daily water intake and provide hydration recommendations.
The platform shall allow users to input any recipe and receive a full calorie and macro breakdown per ingredient and per serving.
The platform shall automatically generate and deliver a weekly AI-powered progress report summarizing weight change, average calories, highlights, and personalized tips.
The platform shall save all user meal logs, AI meal plans, water logs, and recipe analyses to the user's account history.
The platform shall provide a dashboard displaying daily calorie summary, weight trend, water intake, and streaks.
The platform shall ensure data privacy, security, and compliance with data protection regulations.

Users can register with an email and password, log in securely, and maintain a personal profile including height, age, gender, current weight, goal weight, and activity level. All sessions are managed via secure JWT tokens.

Users log meals by describing them in natural language or searching a food database. The AI identifies the food items, estimates calories, and breaks down macronutrients (protein, carbohydrates, fat). All logs are saved to the user's account history and summarized on the dashboard.

Users log their body weight daily. The platform displays a progress chart from the user's starting weight to their current weight and goal. The AI analyzes eating patterns and provides immediate feedback on how today's food choices are expected to impact weight over time.

Users input their target weight and desired timeframe. The AI generates a structured weekly meal plan with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks — each with calorie counts, macros, and brief low-calorie preparation instructions. Plans are saved to the user's account for reference.

A conversational AI interface where users describe what they ate in plain language. The AI immediately responds with the estimated calorie count, macro breakdown, and a clear explanation of how the meal impacts their daily targets and projected weight. All conversations are saved to the user's log.

Users log glasses or milliliters of water consumed throughout the day. The dashboard displays a visual progress indicator toward the daily hydration goal. The AI adjusts hydration recommendations based on the user's calorie intake, activity level, and goal weight.

Users paste or type any recipe into the platform. The AI parses all ingredients and quantities, calculates the calorie and macro content of each ingredient, and presents a full nutrition breakdown per serving. The AI also suggests lower-calorie ingredient substitutions where applicable. Analyzed recipes are saved to the user's history.

Every week, the platform automatically generates a personalized progress report for each user. The report includes total weight change for the week, average daily calorie intake versus target, best and worst days, hydration consistency, and AI-generated tips for the upcoming week. Reports are delivered via email and stored in the user's account.

The main dashboard provides a real-time overview of the user's health metrics including: today's calorie intake vs. target, weight trend chart, water intake progress, current logging streak, saved meal plans, and a summary of the latest AI weekly report.
Total number of sign-ups and monthly active users.
Percentage of users logging meals and weight daily.
Number of AI meal plans generated and followed.
Percentage of users who reach their target weight.
Percentage of users who open and engage with the weekly AI report.
Number of users actively using the water tracker daily.
Number of recipes analyzed per week across the platform.
Average rating from in-app feedback surveys.
Users have access to the internet and a modern web browser.
Users are motivated to log their meals and weight consistently.
AI calorie estimates are based on standard nutritional databases and may vary slightly from actual values.
The platform will be maintained and updated regularly to reflect changes in the AI model and food data.
Users will provide honest inputs (weight, meals) for the AI to generate accurate recommendations.
AI-generated nutrition advice is not a substitute for professional medical or dietary consultation.
Weekly email reports depend on users providing a valid email address at registration.
Barcode scanning and photo-based food recognition are out of scope for Version 1.0.
Compliance with GDPR and applicable data protection regulations is mandatory.
The platform will be available in English in the initial release.
Invest in onboarding UX, push notifications, and streak gamification.
Use verified food databases; allow user corrections; display confidence levels.
Implement encryption, JWT auth, GDPR compliance, and regular audits.
Add medical disclaimers; consult nutrition advisors; cap extreme recommendations.
Weekly AI reports, streaks, badges, and progress milestones to sustain motivation.
Cache common foods locally; fallback to manual entry.
Direct integration with fitness wearables or health devices (e.g., Fitbit, Apple Watch) — Version 1.0.
Barcode scanning for packaged food products — planned for Version 1.1.
Photo-based meal recognition — planned for a future release.
In-app exercise tracking and calorie burn calculation — planned for Version 1.1.
Multi-language support — English only for Version 1.0.
Telehealth or direct communication with registered dietitians.
This BRD outlines the business goals and requirements for the NutriAI platform.
It should be reviewed and updated as the project evolves.
